text:
Simone Biles is back for her third Olympicsin Paris and it looks like she's more than ready to show everyone why she is considered the GOAT of a sport that will likely once again be one of the biggest draws of the Summer Games.

Biles and the rest of the U.S. women's gymnastics team ran through a practice session on Thursday, with events kicking off Sunday and being held almost every day next week. Cameras caught Biles, who pulled herself out of the team finals at the Tokyo Games in 2021 to focus on her mental health, pulling off a sweet move on the vault.
